# Vessel Maintenance Notes

This is the first paragraph under the main heading. It describes general
maintenance procedures for the Leopard 44 catamaran.

The second paragraph continues the introduction and mentions that all
maintenance should be logged in the vessel's maintenance record.

## Engine Maintenance

This paragraph covers engine maintenance procedures for the Yanmar 4JH45
diesel engines. Regular oil changes are recommended every 200 hours.

The impeller should be inspected and replaced annually or every 200 hours
of operation, whichever comes first. Keep spare impellers aboard at all times.
